page_texts.title: Awakenology - Coach
page_texts.text:
Awakenology - Coach
Awakenology
English
Japanese
Chinese
Certified Awakenology Coach
IMPORTANT NOTICE
All Awakenology courses, teachings, materials, methods and coaching are
always free of charge
.
Awakenology does not authorize any paid course, paid coaching, paid certification or fees under the name “Awakenology”.
Any paid Awakenology course is fake and is not related to Awakenology.
The
only official list of Certified Awakenology Coaches
is published exclusively on this page of Awakenology.org.
Any person claiming to be an Awakenology Coach who is not listed on this page
is not a Certified Awakenology Coach
.
Certified Awakenology Coach LIST
Name
Status
Start Date
End Date
Verified Email
YWS
Founder / Coach
2017/08/10
n/a
yws@awakenology.org
Certification Qualification, Validity and Revocation
Qualification for Certification
A “Certified Awakenology Coach” must maintain a Strength of Consciousness (SoC) level above ±14 at all times. This qualification may be revised or upgraded on an annual basis.
Validity of Certification
Coach Certification is not permanent. Its continued validity depends on the coach maintaining the required qualification.
Revocation
Each coach shall be evaluated annually. If a coach fails to meet the required qualification at any time, the Coach Certification may be revoked.
Awakenology Academy (NPO)
© All Rights Reserved since 2017
© 2024
Awakenology.org
